detail: Added 'myuni status' (src/myuni/status.py): deterministic zero-Engine coverage report per field issue, briefed derived by diffing topic issues state=all vs state=open since mythings Issue carries no state; avoids touching the core github contract.

First real deployment: MyThingsLab/study hosts field issues (Physics, AI & ML), 24 topic issues opened by myuni plan --engine claude-cli, first two briefs delivered by myresearcher (study PRs 28/29); documented in README that fleet-cycle does not yet consume my-researcher issues — briefs stay manual until that loop is wired.
